reasoning: The control AC-2 (2) focuses on managing temporary and emergency accounts, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that temporary access is restricted and audited. This involves managing RBAC roles and bindings to ensure that service accounts or user accounts with elevated privileges are monitored and have time-bound access. Additionally, auditing emergency access and enforcing expiry on service accounts aligns with the control's intent.
title: Account Management | Automated Temporary and Emergency Account Management
